payload.answer: I found a conflict: existing memory says Sara is your daughter, while the new input says Sara is your niece. I will not update this until you clarify which relationship is correct, or whether these refer to different people named Sara.

entity_resolution.reason: The input refers to Sara by the same name as the existing memory, but asserts a different family relationship to the user.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new relationship claims.

repair_options: Replace the existing memory with: Sara is my niece.
Keep the existing memory: Sara is my daughter.
Record that there are two different people named Sara, one your daughter and one your niece.
Add a clarifying note if Sara is both your daughter and your niece due to family circumstances.
